name: kit-notification
description: The canonical Filament NOTIFICATIONS chrome, rendered from the lievit-kit notification model onto the lievit-ui notification-bell + notification-bell/{header,item} + toast partials. Two server-first surfaces (strict-CSP clean, no inline script): kit/notification/bell.jte renders the topbar bell from a KitBellView (a recipient-scoped dev.lievit.kit.NotificationBell): an unread-count trigger opening a panel of the recipient's DatabaseNotification rows under a mark-all-read / clear-all header, every mutation a real <form> POST (mark-read per row, mark-all-read, clear-all); kit/notification/toast.jte renders a flashed AdminNotification from a KitToastView onto the toast partial, mapping the AdminNotification.Level (success/info/warning/danger) to the toast variant (which carries the severity colour + alert/status role + leading glyph), the title to the heading, the body to the content, persistent/duration to the auto-dismiss, and the NotificationAction list to token-styled server-first affordances (a url action is a real <a href>, a close/dispatch action a data-* control the toast enhancer wires). The level->variant map is the one render fact KitToastView adds; the per-row title/body/level-glyph/relative-time/mark-read-url are the facts KitBellView adds. The live-refresh (BroadcastNotification over SSE, the lievit-notifications-refresh event) is a runtime concern, NOT a template. This follows the SAME pattern as kit-table: a kit-owned render bundle + a server-rendered chrome over the lievit-ui primitives.
docs: Copies the kit notification chrome to your JTE root under kit/notification/: kit/notification/bell.jte (the topbar bell) + kit/notification/toast.jte (a flashed toast), reached as @template.kit.notification.bell(...) / @template.kit.notification.toast(...). bell.jte renders a KitBellView (dev.lievit.kit.page.KitBellView, wrapping a recipient-scoped dev.lievit.kit.NotificationBell + the host's mark-read %s / mark-all-read / clear-all URLs): pass `bell` and a `csrf` fragment stamped inside every mutation form. toast.jte renders a KitToastView (wrapping a flashed dev.lievit.kit.AdminNotification): pass `toast`; render it from the server only when a flash exists. Both COMPOSE the lievit-ui notification-bell / toast primitives (copy those in too: the registryDependencies), so unlike the raw partials this kit item is the chrome wired to the kit view-model. It path-depends on the io.github.lievit:lievit-kit jar (the NotificationBell / DatabaseNotification / AdminNotification / NotificationAction model the templates and view bundles import). The source is yours: edit freely (Filament's publish-views model, the engine in the jar, the views overridable).
